title: Launch site uses kage-core.com custom domain
summary: Kage launch site custom domain is kage core.com. GitHub Pages needs docs/CNAME with kage core.com, and DNS should point the apex domain to GitHub Pages records. After DNS propagates, enable Enforce HTTPS in repository Pa
body: Kage launch site custom domain is kage-core.com. GitHub Pages needs docs/CNAME with kage-core.com, and DNS should point the apex domain to GitHub Pages records. After DNS propagates, enable Enforce HTTPS in repository Pages settings.

context.fact: Kage launch site uses kage-core.com as its GitHub Pages custom domain.
context.why: The launch site needs a stable branded domain rather than only the github.io URL.
context.trigger: Recall when changing GitHub Pages configuration, DNS, launch docs, or hosted site links.
context.action: Keep docs/CNAME set to kage-core.com and enable Enforce HTTPS in Pages settings after DNS propagates.
context.verification: Repo-local capture grounded to docs/CNAME, .github/workflows/pages.yml, and docs/index.html.
context.risk_if_forgotten: Agents may remove the CNAME, publish only the github.io URL, or miss the HTTPS/DNS setup needed for launch.
context.stale_when: The project changes domains, disables GitHub Pages, or moves the launch site away from docs/CNAME.
